steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
cat > /workspace/Dockerfile <<'DOCKEOF'
FROM busybox:latest
WORKDIR /app
RUN adduser -D appuser
USER appuser
CMD ["echo", "BusyBox container is running!"]
DOCKEOF
echo 'Dockerfile created'

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
docker buildx create --driver docker-container --name rb-builder --use
docker buildx build \
  --push \
  --platform=linux/amd64,linux/arm64,linux/arm/v7 \
  --tag us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi \
  -f /workspace/Dockerfile \
  /workspace
echo 'Multi-platform push complete'

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
echo '=== Pulling amd64 ==='
docker pull --platform linux/amd64 us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi
docker tag us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-amd64
echo '=== Verify ==='
docker inspect us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-amd64 | grep -E '"Architecture|"Os"' || true

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
echo '=== Pulling arm64 ==='
docker pull --platform linux/arm64 us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi
docker tag us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-arm64
echo '=== Verify ==='
docker inspect us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-arm64 | grep -E '"Architecture|"Os"' || true

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
echo '=== Pulling armv7 ==='
docker pull --platform linux/arm/v7 us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi
docker tag us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-multi us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-armv7
echo '=== Verify ==='
docker inspect us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox:varB-armv7 | grep -E '"Architecture|"Os"' || true

steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
echo '=== All local images ==='
docker images | grep rbev-busybox || true
